languages.text: {n}Капитан Дунавски кивает вам:{/n} "32-ой меровский полк, для обновления обетов династии фон Валанциус — стро-о-о-о-ойся!"
{n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"
languages.original_text: {n}Капитан Дунавски кивает вам:{/n} "32-ой меровский полк, для обновления обетов династии фон Валанциус — стро-о-о-о-ойся!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"
{n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"
{n}Dunawski nods, trying not to look at the colonel any more than necessary:{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"
{n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"
{n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"
{n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"

languages.text: {n}ダナウスキーは頷き、必要以上に大佐を見ないように努める。{/n}「32番目のメローフ連隊、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の家臣の誓いを更新する。さあ、降伏せよ！」
languages.original_text: {n}Dunawski nods, trying not to look at the colonel any more than necessary:{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"

traits.locale_text: ダナウスキーは頷き、必要以上に大佐を見ないように努める。{n}「32番目のメローフ連隊、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の家臣の誓いを更新する。さあ、降伏せよ！」

languages.text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski vous fait un signe de tête.{/n} « 32e régiment de Merov, pour renouveler vos serments d'allégeance à la dynastie von Valancius... formez les rangs ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitaine Dunawski vous fait un signe de tête.{/n} « 32e régiment de Merov, pour renouveler vos serments d'allégeance à la dynastie von Valancius... formez les rangs ! »

languages.text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski sana başını sallıyor.{/n} "32. Merov Alayı, von Valancius hanedanlığına yeminlerinizi yenilemek için hizaya geç!"
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Yüzbaşı Dunawski sana başını sallıyor.{/n} "32. Merov Alayı, von Valancius hanedanlığına yeminlerinizi yenilemek için hizaya geç!"

languages.text: {n}Captain Dunawski nickt dir zu.{/n} "32. Merov-Regiment, für die Erneuerung eures Eides gegenüber der Dynastie derer von Valancius .... aaantreten!"
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nickt dir zu.{/n} "32. Merov-Regiment, für die Erneuerung eures Eides gegenüber der Dynastie derer von Valancius .... aaantreten!"

languages.text: {n}La capitana Dunawski asiente.{/n} «¡32.º regimiento de Merov, renovamos nuestros juramentos a la dinastía von Valancius! ¡Fiiiiirmes!».
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La capitana Dunawski asiente.{/n} «¡32.º regimiento de Merov, renovamos nuestros juramentos a la dinastía von Valancius! ¡Fiiiiirmes!».

languages.text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉向你点了点头。{/n}“梅罗夫第32团，向冯·瓦兰修斯王朝重新宣誓效忠，集——合！”
languages.original_text: {n}Captain Dunawski nods at you.{/n} "32nd Merov Regiment, to renew your oaths to the von Valancius dynasty — faaaaaall in!"

traits.locale_text: {n}杜纳芙斯卡上尉向你点了点头。{/n}“梅罗夫第32团，向冯·瓦兰修斯王朝重新宣誓效忠，集——合！”
